mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce discount rates applied to equity cash flows, generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending recession, causing negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day returns occur in > 65% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates robust consumer demand and credit availability, driving positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Interaction term loses statistical significance with p-value exceeding 0.10 in out-of-sample regression.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and supply-side momentum, yielding positive monthly equity returns during expansion phases.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses to negative during supply-constrained inflationary periods.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained consumer price index levels above 250 trigger expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations over the following week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive in > 70% of high-inflation observations.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising nonfarm payrolls and declining unemployment rates confirms genuine labor market tightening, supporting positive quarterly equity performance.
failure_condition: Joint signal fails to predict returns with Rank IC exceeding 0.04 over 5-year out-of-sample windows.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real gross domestic product reflects expanding economic output and corporate earnings potential, generating positive monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth shows zero correlation with 20-day forward returns across multiple business cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below the 105 index threshold indicates severe supply-side contraction and manufacturing weakness, forecasting negative quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Equity markets rally for > 60% of the quarter following the threshold breach.
